nasb.text: and then as a widow to the age of eighty-four. She never left the temple, serving night and day with fastings and prayers.

esv.text: and then as a widow until she was eighty-four. She did not depart from the temple, worshiping with fasting and prayer night and day.

cnv.text: 就寡居了，直到八十四歲。她沒有離開過聖殿，以禁食和禱告晝夜事奉主。

csbs.text: 后来守寡了，现在已经八十四岁。她从不离开圣殿，禁食祈祷，日夜事奉神。
